texts.name: Aerwen
texts.biography: Aerwen calmly walks the fine line between life and death, so calmly that it unsettles even her allies. Where others see fallen warriors, she sees only a brief pause in the forest's rhythm. With whispered ancient words and the touch of old magic, she returns the departed to life, though each such return carries a price only she is willing to pay. Some say Aerwen bargains with powers beyond the forest thickets, but she only smiles and reminds them: in nature, nothing disappears forever.

specialty.description: Spell bonus: Resurrection. The hero casts this spell with increased effect.
specialty.name: Resurrection
